##RRUFFID=R060501

##LOCALITY=Dover mine, near Hawthorne, Mineral County, Nevada, USA
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Michael Scott
##DESCRIPTION=Brownish-orange coarsely granular
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis

##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Powder
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 6.8224 b: 6.8224 c: 6.8224 alpha: 61.522 beta: 61.522 gamma: 61.522 volume: 232.21 crystal system: hexagonal
##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
